heading: Applied silvicultural assessments
label: 6554 Applied silvicultural assessments

children.heading: Assessment efforts
children.label: a Assessment efforts
children.text: For information gathering and research purposes, the Secretary may conduct applied silvicultural assessments on Federal land that the Secretary determines is at risk of infestation by, or is infested with, forest-damaging insects.

children.label: A
children.text: a component of the National Wilderness Preservation System;

children.label: B
children.text: any Federal land on which, by Act of Congress or Presidential proclamation, the removal of vegetation is restricted or prohibited;

children.label: C
children.text: a congressionally-designated wilderness study area; or

children.label: D
children.text: an area in which activities under subsection (a) would be inconsistent with the applicable land and resource management plan.

children.heading: Certain treatment prohibited
children.label: 2 Certain treatment prohibited
children.text: Nothing in subsection (a) authorizes the application of insecticides in municipal watersheds or associated riparian areas.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Before being carried out, each applied silvicultural assessment under this subchapter shall be peer reviewed by scientific experts selected by the Secretary, which shall include non-Federal experts.

children.heading: Existing peer review processes
children.label: B Existing peer review processes
children.text: The Secretary may use existing peer review processes to the extent the processes comply with subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Public notice
children.label: 1 Public notice
children.text: The Secretary shall provide notice of each applied silvicultural assessment proposed to be carried out under this section.

children.heading: Public comment
children.label: 2 Public comment
children.text: The Secretary shall provide an opportunity for public comment before carrying out an applied silviculture assessment under this section.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Applied silvicultural assessment and research treatments carried out under this section on not more than 1,000 acres for an assessment or treatment may be categorically excluded from documentation in an environmental impact statement and environmental assessment under the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 4321

children.label: A
children.text: shall not be carried out in an area that is adjacent to another area that is categorically excluded under paragraph (1) that is being treated with similar methods; and

children.label: B
children.text: shall be subject to the extraordinary circumstances procedures established by the Secretary pursuant to section 1508.4 of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Maximum categorical exclusion
children.label: 3 Maximum categorical exclusion
children.text: The total number of acres categorically excluded under paragraph (1) shall not exceed 250,000 acres.

children.heading: No additional findings required
children.label: 4 No additional findings required
children.text: In accordance with paragraph (1), the Secretary shall not be required to make any findings as to whether an applied silvicultural assessment project, either individually or cumulatively, has a significant effect on the environment.
